description_long: This is a standard brown paper grocery bag, rectangular in shape with a flat base and vertical sides. The bag is made from a single sheet of kraft paper, folded and creased to form sharp edges and a sturdy structure. The surface is matte and slightly crinkled, giving it a natural, uncoated appearance. There are no visible handles, branding, or printed designs on the exterior, and the bag appears completely plain. The opening is at the top, and the bag is empty, as indicated by its flat, unexpanded sides. This type of bag is commonly used for carrying groceries or other lightweight items in urban environments.
description: A plain, brown kraft paper grocery bag with a flat base, no handles, and a matte, crinkled surface. The bag is empty and unbranded, with a top-facing opening.
description_view_0: Front view of the brown paper grocery bag, showing a flat, unmarked surface with a slightly crinkled texture and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the folded, gusseted structure of the bag, with the triangular base and creased vertical edges clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying a plain, flat brown surface with subtle crinkles and no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the gusseted fold and triangular base, mirroring the structure seen in view 1.
